title: Add Breadcrumb component
description: Create a Breadcrumb React component in src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx that renders a trail of links. Props: items: { label: string; href?: string }[]. Active item (last) is plain text, others are links. Include unit test.
existing_patterns: src/components/board/PriorityBadge.tsx - Component with props interface, uses CSS module, 'use client' directive
src/components/board/PriorityBadge.test.tsx - Vitest test with @testing-library/react, render and screen queries
src/components/board/PriorityBadge.module.css - CSS module with scoped class names
